violations.text: Raw animal foods such as raw shelled eggs were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods such as lemons in the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Items were reorganized during time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/12/2026

Milk, cream and almond milk were observed held at 44, 47, and 48 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Per interview of staff, unit was just cleaned. Milks were placed into other refrigeration during time of inspection to chill. Unit reached 41 degrees Fahrenheit during time of inspection. Unit to be monitored for proper temperature control. If unit cannot maintain an internal food temperature of 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below, unit to be serviced. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/12/2026

Bakery items such as cakes and pies packaged in the food establishment are lacking labels with complete information. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredient (including sub ingredients), the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. Items were placed behind the counter during time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/12/2026
Proofer door gaskets were observed in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 06/12/2026

The chlorine concentration in the sanitizing solution of the 3-bay sink was 0 parts per million (ppm). The concentration of chlorine in the sanitizing solution must be between 50-100 ppm. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/10/2025
Several floor tiles near 3 bay sink were observed in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/10/2025
